chunks.title: Jonathan and David's Covenant
chunks.reason: Describes the deep bond between Jonathan and David and Saul's initial acceptance of David.

chunks.title: Saul's Jealousy and Anger
chunks.reason: Details the women's song comparing Saul and David, leading to Saul's rage and first attempt to kill David.

chunks.title: David's Rise and Saul's Suspicion
chunks.reason: Describes David's promotion to commander and Saul's growing dread as David prospers.

chunks.title: The First Marriage Proposal
chunks.reason: Contains the dialogue regarding Saul offering Merab to David and David's humble response.

chunks.title: The Dowry of Foreskins
chunks.reason: Narrates Saul's plan to use the Philistines to kill David through the dowry requirement and its fulfillment.

chunks.title: David's Continued Success
chunks.reason: Concludes with David's superior performance against the Philistines and his high esteem among the people.
